nasb.text: These men must also first be tested; then let them serve as deacons if they are beyond reproach.

esv.text: And let them also be tested first; then let them serve as deacons if they prove themselves blameless.

cnv.text: 他們也必須先受考驗，若沒有可責之處，然後才讓他們作執事。

ccb.text: 他们要先接受考验，倘若无可指责，就可以立他们为执事。

csbs.text: 并且这些人也当先受考验，如果是无可指责的，才可以做执事。
